utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 corresponding sections. Check if each is fully specified per the format: each item requires the type of coverage and costs. In the plan, health_coverage specifies physical and mental health insurance with a monthly cost and added details; property_coverage specifies home/contents insurance with a monthly cost; travel_coverage specifies travel insurance with a monthly cost; additional_services specifies enhancement services with a monthly cost; total_budget provides a complete monthly/annual cost breakdown with additional details. All items are fully specified according to the requested details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists four items: LifeFirst Standard Plan for health, EliteHome Premium for property, PrimeTravel Premium for travel, and Premium Insurance Membership as an additional service. From the ground-truth ratings: LifeFirst Standard Plan appears under both physical and mental health with rating 8 (health coverage states physical and mental health insurance, but it's the same named plan, rated 8). EliteHome Premium corresponds to EliteHome Premium Coverage with rating 10. PrimeTravel Premium corresponds to PrimeTravel Premium Plan with rating 10. Premium Insurance Membership matches the general service Premium Insurance Membership with rating 10.
